description: Finnish private cancer hospital and comprehensive diagnostic center. Offers cancer treatment, imaging, laboratory services, and specialist consultations. First private cancer hospital in Finland.
business_model: B2C - Direct to patients; B2B for employer health services
target_market: Finnish patients and employers seeking fast access to specialist care
competitive_advantage: First private cancer hospital, comprehensive diagnostics, premium service quality

varden_fit.rationale: Referral partner for complex cases - complements primary occupational health
